support.footerPrefix: Got any trouble or have recommendations? Mail us at
support.hint: Please include your Shopify store URL (e.g. admin.shopify.com/store/your-store) and a screenshot or steps to reproduce so we can help faster.

appDirectory.title: More Upatra apps
appDirectory.subtitle: More tools from the makers of this app. Each installs from the Shopify App Store.
appDirectory.empty: No other apps to show right now.

crossAppBanner.trust: From the makers of this app

pitch.aiz_exporter: Schedule CSV, Excel or JSON exports of orders, products & customers — filtered your way and auto-delivered to email, FTP or Google Sheets.
pitch.bulk_tagging: Auto-tag orders, products & customers by rule — and tag in bulk by hand or CSV. Keep your store organized without the busywork.

reviewPrompt.title: Enjoying {{appName}}?
reviewPrompt.body: If {{appName}} has saved you time, a short rating on the Shopify App Store goes a long way — it helps other store owners find it and tells me what to keep improving. Less than a minute, no pressure.

toast.downloadBlocked: Download was blocked. Please allow download for this site.
